name: interior-design
description: AI room styling MVP architecture for shoppable, editable room designs.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @interior/domain run build && npm --workspace @interior/catalog run build && npm --workspace @interior/recommendation run build && npm --workspace @interior/api run build && npm --workspace @interior/web run build
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run test
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
